description: Temporary, governed exemptions from the api/api-client contract-mirror requirement. Every entry must name its planned removal milestone; the gate fails on missing fields and on stale entries (module mirrored or gone). This is visible debt, not hidden debt: the gate prints this table on every run.

exemptions.reason: Draft authentication contracts predate their HTTP surface; typed client mirror becomes real when auth routes land under the universal guard.
Decision logic for the auth routes arriving with the universal guard.
PDP contracts gain their client mirror when the authorization surface is exposed with the universal guard.
PDP evaluation handlers for the M2.3 authorization surface.
Tenancy access contracts surface with the ActingContext resolver and workspace-switch endpoints.
Tenancy evaluation handlers for the M2.2/M2.3 context surface.
Audit workflows are unified onto the outbox dispatcher before any client surface exists.
Consent contracts gain routes and a typed client with consent persistence.
Consent workflow handlers for the M4.1 consent surface.
Relationship contracts gain their surface with relationship persistence.
Relationship workflow handlers for the M4.2 surface.
Break-glass workflows gain their surface with the persisted break-glass flow.
